basic_details.job_title: BBMB Trade Apprentice Lineman Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) Trade Apprentice Lineman Notification 2026 has been released on 30 June 2026 on the official website of BBMB. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the BBMB Trade Apprentice Lineman Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th class with minimum 40% marks from recognized Board, National Trade Certificate in the notified trade issued by NCVT/SCVT, Completed relevant ITI course, Aadhaar Card (compulsory)
qualification.details: Passed 10th class with minimum 40% marks from recognized Board and National Trade Certificate in the notified trade issued by NCVT/SCVT; must have completed relevant ITI course; Aadhaar Card compulsory

selection_process: Online Registration through Apprenticeship Portal Merit Based Selection
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BBMB Trade Apprentice Lineman Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BBMB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BBMB Trade Apprentice Lineman Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BBMB Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BBMB Trade Apprentice Lineman Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Passed 10th class with minimum 40% marks from recognized Board and National Trade Certificate in the notified trade issued by NCVT/SCVT; must have completed relevant ITI course; Aadhaar Card compulsory

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Online Registration through Apprenticeship Portal Merit Based Selection

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BBMB Trade Apprentice Lineman Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BBMB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BBMB Trade Apprentice Lineman Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB). It is a government organization responsible for the administration of the Bhakra Nangal Project and Beas Project.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Trade Apprentice Lineman. This role involves practical training and work experience in the relevant trade.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Trade Apprentice Lineman?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies available for the Trade Apprentice Lineman post in this recruitment drive. Candidates are encouraged to apply early.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for BBMB Trade Apprentice Lineman recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the BBMB Trade Apprentice Lineman recruitment is Online. Candidates must submit their applications through the designated online portal.

faq.question: Q5. What are the key educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 10th class with at least 40% marks, possess a National Trade Certificate in the notified trade from NCVT/SCVT, and have completed the relevant ITI course. An Aadhaar Card is compulsory.

faq.question: Q6. What are the important dates for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process starts on 01 July 2026, and the last date to apply is 30 July 2026. The notification was released on 30 June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the BBMB Trade Apprentice Lineman post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the BBMB Trade Apprentice Lineman recruitment. This makes it accessible for all eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Trade Apprentice Lineman in BBMB?
faq.answer: The selection process involves online registration through the Apprenticeship Portal, followed by a merit-based selection. Candidates will be chosen based on their qualifications and performance.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job location for the Trade Apprentice Lineman post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Trade Apprentice Lineman post is Delhi, specifically within the city of Delhi. This offers opportunities for candidates residing in or willing to relocate to the region.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB)?
faq.answer: The official website for Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) is https://bbmb.nic.in. Candidates can visit this website for official notifications, updates, and to apply online.
